skill.name: site-management
skill.description: Manage and monitor UniFi sites across an account, including site lists, details, overview statistics, organization structure, and inventory reporting.
skill.summary: Review UniFi site inventory, details, and overview statistics for multi-site infrastructure management.
skill.author: DataKnifeAI

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged Markdown backticks as Ruby or shell command execution, but the lines list UniFi tool names and workflow steps. The weak cryptographic algorithm alert at SKILL.md line 3 is also a text-only false positive; no executable code, network exfiltration, prompt injection, or malicious intent was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Tool Names Flagged as Commands
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged inline Markdown code spans for list_sites, get_site_details, and get_site_overview. These lines document available UniFi tools and workflow steps, and they do not execute shell or Ruby commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged text is plain Markdown documentation for tool names and ordered workflows. No command invocation syntax, scripts, or user-controlled execution path is present.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Description
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged SKILL.md line 3 for weak cryptography, but the line is the skill description. It describes UniFi site management and contains no hash function, encryption call, or cryptographic implementation.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line 3 is metadata text, not executable code. There is no evidence of MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4, or related weak cryptographic usage.

content.value_statement: Multi-site UniFi environments are hard to review when site data is scattered. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code list sites, inspect details, and prepare inventory summaries.
actual_capabilities: List all UniFi sites available in the connected account.
Retrieve detailed information for a selected UniFi site.
Request overview statistics for a specific site.
Support multi-site inventory and organization reviews.
Help compare site details for standardization planning.
Generate site-focused summaries for infrastructure reports.
limitations: It depends on the connected UniFi tools and their permissions.
It does not create, modify, or delete UniFi sites.
It does not independently verify live network health outside tool results.
It cannot access sites that the connected account cannot see.

use_cases.title: Build a Site Inventory
use_cases.description: List all managed UniFi sites and summarize key details for reporting.

use_cases.title: Review Site Structure
use_cases.description: Inspect site details to confirm naming, organization, and configuration consistency.

use_cases.title: Plan Multi-Site Expansion
use_cases.description: Compare current sites and identify information needed before adding new locations.

prompt_templates.title: List My Sites
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me all UniFi sites in the connected account and include a short summary.

prompt_templates.title: Inspect One Site
prompt_templates.prompt: Get details for the selected UniFi site and summarize its configuration and organization information.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Sites
prompt_templates.prompt: List all UniFi sites, gather details for each site, and compare their naming, structure, and configuration patterns.

prompt_templates.title: Prepare Expansion Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a site inventory report with overview statistics, notable gaps, and recommendations for planning additional UniFi locations.

output_examples.input: Show me all UniFi sites in my account.
output_examples.output: A concise site list with names, identifiers when available, and a short count of total managed sites.

output_examples.input: Compare site details across all locations.
output: A grouped comparison of site names and available configuration details.
A summary of consistency gaps that may need administrator review.

output_examples.input: Get a complete site inventory for reporting.
output_examples.output: A report-ready summary with site inventory, organization notes, overview metrics, and follow-up items.

best_practices: Confirm the connected UniFi account has access to every site you want reviewed.
Use consistent site names before comparing configuration details across locations.
Review generated summaries against UniFi source data before operational decisions.
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill as the only source for incident response decisions.
Do not assume missing sites are deleted without checking account permissions.
Do not request changes to sites because this skill is for review workflows.

faq.question: What UniFi tasks does this skill support?
faq.answer: It supports listing sites, retrieving site details, requesting site overview statistics, and preparing site inventory summaries.

faq.question: Can it change UniFi site settings?
faq.answer: No. The documented capability is site review and reporting, not configuration changes.

faq.question: Does it work with multiple sites?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill is designed for multi-site overview, comparison, planning, and reporting workflows.

faq.question: What tools are referenced by the skill?
faq.answer: It references list_sites, get_site_details, and get_site_overview as the available UniFi site tools.

faq.question: Can it find sites outside my account?
faq.answer: No. It can only work with sites visible to the connected UniFi account and available tools.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The audit found only Markdown false positives and no executable security issue in the reviewed file.
